violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the sanitizer bucket was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 - 400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the sanitizer bucket was observed at 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 - 300 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
Utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2023

Ambient temperature of the counter lowboy unit observed at 44 degrees F. Top of this lowboy unit was warm to the touch. Food products evaluated and TCS foods relocated to properly functioning cold hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service call to be placed and no TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is repaired and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2023
Refrigerator door gasket of the lift-up cold hold unit observed in poor repair, splitting away from the seal. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
